<!doctype html>
<html lang="hu" translate="no" class="notranslate">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>SetupConfigurator</title>
  <base href="/">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

  <!-- Legerősebb "ne fordíts" jelzések -->
  <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Language" content="hu">

  <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="favicon.ico">
  <link rel="stylesheet"
        href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
  <script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async defer></script>
</head>

<body translate="no" class="notranslate">
<app-root class="notranslate"></app-root>
</body>
</html>

Bejelentkezés

{{ errorMessage }}

Nincs fiókom! Regisztrálok

Jelszó visszaállítás

Add meg az email címed, és küldünk egy 6 jegyű kódot.

{{ error }}
{{ message }}

Új jelszó beállítása

A kód erre ment: {{ email }}

{{ error }}
{{ message }}

<app-register-form
  *ngIf="step === 'form'"
  [fullname]="fullname" (fullnameChange)="fullname = $event"
  [username]="username" (usernameChange)="username = $event"
  [email]="email" (emailChange)="email = $event"
  [password]="password" (passwordChange)="password = $event"
  [loading]="loading"
  [errorMessage]="errorMessage"
  [successMessage]="successMessage"
  (submit)="submit()">
</app-register-form>

<app-register-code
  *ngIf="step === 'code'"
  [email]="email"
  [code]="code" (codeChange)="code = $event"
  [loading]="loading"
  [errorMessage]="errorMessage"
  [successMessage]="successMessage"
  (verify)="verify()"
  (resend)="resendCode()"
  (back)="backToForm()">
</app-register-code>

Email megerősítés

<svg class="connections-svg">
  @if (!viewingSetup) {
    @for (conn of globalRoomConnections; track conn.id) {
      <path
        [attr.d]="getRoomLinePath(conn, lineRefreshTrigger)"
        class="connection-line cross">
      </path>
    }

    @if (pairingStage === 'PICK_TARGET_SETUP' || pairingStage === 'PICK_TARGET_ITEM') {
      <path
        [attr.d]="getGhostLinePath()"
        class="connection-line ghost-line">
      </path>
    }
  } @else {
    @for (conn of connections; track conn.id) {
      @if (!viewingSetup || !conn.crossSetup) {
        <path
          [attr.d]="getLinePath(conn, lineRefreshTrigger)"
          class="connection-line"
          [class.cross]="conn.crossSetup">
        </path>
      }
    }
  }
</svg>
